_instructions: bannerType: 'green' | 'red' | 'orange'. Set enabled to false to hide manually. The banner ALSO auto-hides after endDate (YYYY-MM-DD, America/Toronto, inclusive — shows through the end of that day, gone the next). Canada Day Sale runs June 15 – July 5.
message: 🍁 Canada Day Sale: 10% OFF Storewide incl. Clearance + 10% Back in Rewards on everything else. Use code CanadaDay10 at checkout · Ends July 5
